case_title: PAUL A. VAN DER WAERDT VS. SMARTSTOP SELF-STORAGE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-02-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-14-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-14-2012 AT 2:00PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VAN DER WAERDT, PAUL A. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
